description: A retro-style arcade cabinet with a dark, metallic finish and vibrant red and blue accents. The side panel features a striking, stylized illustration of a robotic wolf or canine head with glowing red eyes against a fiery, orange background. The top marquee displays the game title 'CYBER SXINE' in a futuristic font. The screen shows a menu with options like 'PLAY', 'SETTINGS', and 'EXIT' in a glowing red font, with a hint of digital noise or static. A red joystick and buttons are prominently placed on the control panel, ready for gameplay. The overall design evokes a sense of nostalgia for classic arcade games with a modern, cyberpunk aesthetic.
